description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, boxy silhouette with a smooth, matte exterior. A prominent circular element is centered on the front, possibly serving as a decorative accent or a functional pocket. At the top, a single corded strap with a round bead is attached, suggesting a drawstring or cinch-style closure. The bottom of the bag is adorned with a knotted tassel, adding a subtle decorative touch. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible logos or patterns, and the color is a uniform dark shade. The bag appears compact and practical, suitable for carrying small personal items in an urban environment.
description: A compact, rectangular handbag with a smooth, dark exterior, featuring a corded strap, circular front accent, and a knotted tassel at the bottom.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular accent, corded strap with bead at the top, and knotted tassel at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile and the protrusion of the circular accent from the main body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, unadorned surface with the corded strap and tassel visible at the edges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the thickness of the bag and the attachment points of the strap and tassel.
attribute_strap_type: single corded strap with bead, short to medium length, non-adjustable, attached at top corners
attribute_closure_mechanism: drawstring closure at the top, secured with a round bead
attribute_decorative_elements: knotted tassel at the bottom, circular accent on the front
